verses.text: A rod shall grow from the stem of Jesse, and 'the spirit of the LORD shall rest upon him,' wisdom and might and the fear of the LORD. This is Christ, the promised King from David's line. The Spirit anoints Him fully for His righteous reign.

A rod shall grow from the stem of Jesse, and 'the spirit of the LORD shall rest upon him,' wisdom and might and the fear of the LORD. This is Christ, the promised King from David's line. The Spirit anoints Him fully for His righteous reign.

A rod shall grow from the stem of Jesse, and 'the spirit of the LORD shall rest upon him,' wisdom and might and the fear of the LORD. This is Christ, the promised King from David's line. The Spirit anoints Him fully for His righteous reign.

With righteousness He judges the poor and slays the wicked 'with the breath of his lips,' righteousness His belt. His rule is perfectly just. Christ defends the lowly and overthrows evil by the word of His mouth.

With righteousness He judges the poor and slays the wicked 'with the breath of his lips,' righteousness His belt. His rule is perfectly just. Christ defends the lowly and overthrows evil by the word of His mouth.

Wolf with lamb, leopard with kid, a child leading them — 'they shall not hurt nor destroy in all my holy mountain,' for the earth is full of the knowledge of the LORD. A picture of restored peace. Christ's kingdom heals the world's enmity and fills it with the knowledge of God.

Wolf with lamb, leopard with kid, a child leading them — 'they shall not hurt nor destroy in all my holy mountain,' for the earth is full of the knowledge of the LORD. A picture of restored peace. Christ's kingdom heals the world's enmity and fills it with the knowledge of God.

Wolf with lamb, leopard with kid, a child leading them — 'they shall not hurt nor destroy in all my holy mountain,' for the earth is full of the knowledge of the LORD. A picture of restored peace. Christ's kingdom heals the world's enmity and fills it with the knowledge of God.

In that day the root of Jesse stands as 'an ensign of the people,' and the Lord gathers the remnant from every land. The nations rally to Christ. He draws scattered peoples home to God from the ends of the earth.

In that day the root of Jesse stands as 'an ensign of the people,' and the Lord gathers the remnant from every land. The nations rally to Christ. He draws scattered peoples home to God from the ends of the earth.

In that day the root of Jesse stands as 'an ensign of the people,' and the Lord gathers the remnant from every land. The nations rally to Christ. He draws scattered peoples home to God from the ends of the earth.

Old jealousies of Ephraim and Judah end, and God makes a way for His people as in the day of Egypt. Strife gives place to unity. The Redeemer reunites His people and leads them out as in the great deliverance of old.
